reference: I pulled my back three days ago and it has been in spasm for all these days. It hurts to breathe. I have been taking Tylenol every four to five hours with no relief. I am allergic to nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs and aspirin. I have tried ice packs, Bengay, and resting. Nothing stops the spasms. I am uninsured and wondering if I should go to the emergency room. I would say on a scale of one to ten, the pain is an eight. I am twenty-seven years old.
text: I pulled my back 3 days ago, and it has been in spasm for all these days. It hurts to breathe. I have been taking Tylenol every 4 to 5 hours with no relief. I am allergic to nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs and aspirin. I have tried ice packs, Bengay, and resting; nothing stops the spasms. I am uninsured in wondering if I should go to the emergency room. I would say on a scale of 1 to 10, the pain is an 8. I am 27 years old.
